---
name: Revert
about: Reverts a previous commit (revert:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What is being reverted and why? Link the original PR or commit. -->

## Commits

Use **`revert:`** with a clear subject, e.g. `revert: undo proxy path change`.

Git’s default **`Revert "<subject>"`** commit message is also fine.

## Checklist

- [ ] Stakeholders aware if the revert affects production or releases
- [ ] Follow-up issue filed if the original change needs a safer redo
